title: Oman Starts Receiving Supplies for First Green Hydrogen Project
content:
Project cargo has begun arriving at the Special Economic Zone at Duqm (SEZAD) for Omanâ€™s first green hydrogen and ammonia venture, the first of the many poised to scale the Sultanateâ€™s green energy industry.

Green Hydrogen and Chemicals Company SAOC (GHC), a wholly owned subsidiary of India-based renewable energy developer ACME Group, is developing the green ammonia plant with an initial capacity of 100,000 tonnes per annum (tpa).
author: Analysts Account
